I am a simple lady I only need:

a good book
good food
great friends
a very fulfilling and engaged romantic partnership
the perfect outfit
dim lights
everyone to leave me alone at work
an engaging knitting project where I can still hit flow state
moisturized skin
nothing on the back of my neck

data.body:
#RedSox looking better today, but entered this game with a team batting AVG of just .231.

Since 1970, BOS has only had a lower team AVG over the first 17 games of season 4 times before, 3 of those times since 2022: 1972 (.218), 2022 (.225), and 2024 (.226).
